title: Senior Engineer Process
description:
Role Purpose:

Responsible for developing new or known industrial processes and designing new process plants / equipment or modifying existing ones

Job Responsibilities:

  • Preparation of PFDs, P&IDs, specifications, data sheets and functional descriptions.
  • Pressure loss calculations, equipment sizing, utility, heat and mass balances
  • Process capacity calculations fromcustomer URS
  • Lead design reviews – with customer and internal Exyte team
  • Cost Estimating
  • Tender preparation and bid evaluation
  • Process simulation capabilities and knowledge of respective software
  • Able to handle process system on package unit or stick built basis
  • Taking the design through to implementation, commissioning, qualification and handover
  • Monitoring the start-up of all process systems and ensuring that these are progress in-line with the project schedule and quality requirements
  • Financially review and evaluate Sub-Contractor variations and claims
  • Assessing safety and environmental issues
  • Manage, review and approve subcontractor’s detailed design
  • Quality control and vendor / subcontractor inspections
  • Preparation of as built documentation and manuals
  • Chairing sub-contractor progress meetings Chairing Discipline meetings and preparing meeting minutes
  • Mentoring of Engineers with the intent of securing properly trained personnel to ensure the continual expansion of the company
  • Trouble shooting of design and construction related problems and assisting the system engineers in developing solutions
  • In the absence of a Project based Lead Engineer, the Senior Engineer shall assume the role and responsibilities assigned to the Lead Engineer position
  • In the absence of a Project based Engineer, the Senior Engineer shall assume the role and responsibilities assigned to the Engineer position
  • Creates a business network (eg. Tradeshows, ISPE, Institute of Engineers etc.), network and with key client, staff, industry groups etc.
  • Stays up-to-date with technical development, innovation and the industry.
  • Ensuring the System Supervisor is fully briefed on the awarded scope of work, the tender technical documents and all contractual revisions to tender documentation
  • Ensure design checklist is established and maintained for all projects


Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in a related engineering field
  • MSc / MEng preferred
  • Minimum years of experience: 8 - 10 years of professional experience 
  • Experience in design and / or construction of process systems or clean utility systems
  • Experience in multinational life science projects, preferably in Pharmaceutical, Nutritional, Biopharmaceutical and Medical devices Industries
  • Highly proficient in communication
  • Cross culturally aware and adaptable
  • Being assertive and confident
  • Able to impacts and influences
  • Good negotiation skills 
  • Highly analytical
  • Customer focus
  • Highly structured, systematic and organised
  • Understanding of Codes and Engineering Standards of International Clients
  • Conversant in the use of design software
  • Remains technically competent in applicable fields of engineering
  • Working knowledge and preferably with practical experiences with recognised GMP Regulatory Guidelines from the PIC/S, EU, US FDA & local FDA, etc.

postedCompany.description:
EXYTE SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

About Us

Exyte is a global leader in the design, engineering, and delivery of ultra-clean and sustainable facilities for high-tech industries. With cutting-edge expertise developed over more than a century, we serve clients in the sophisticated markets of semiconductors, battery cells, pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, and data centers. Exyte offers a full range of services from consulting to managing the implementation of turnkey solutions with the highest standards in safety and quality to our customers worldwide. We create a better future by enabling key industries to enhance the quality of modern life. In 2021, Exyte generated sales of EUR 4.9 billion with around 7,400 employees worldwide. www.exyte.net
